news.title: Bungie isn't immediately making Destiny 3, is planning layoffs, reports Bloomberg
news.titleEN: Bungie isn't immediately making Destiny 3, is planning layoffs, reports Bloomberg
news.desc: Hopes that the end of Destiny 2 means Destiny 3 is on the way aren't necessarily dashed—but if it happens, it'll be a long time from now.
news.descEN: Hopes that the end of Destiny 2 means Destiny 3 is on the way aren't necessarily dashed—but if it happens, it'll be a long time from now.

news.title: Destiny 2 hasn't been the game I'd loved in years, but it still sucks to know it's ending
